/usr/bin/ar qc libGeometry.a CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Circle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/CubeTri.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Line2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/LineSeg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Plane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Point2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Point3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Transform2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Transform3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/TriTri.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Vector2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Vector3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/RayBox.c.o CMakeFiles/Geometry.dir/Ray.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libGeometry.a
